title: galium umbellatum subvar. nitidulum
intro: Galium umbellatum subvar. nitidulum, also known as the shiny lesser bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Galium umbellatum subvar. nitidulum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
